title: Pharmacokinetic Drug-Drug Interactions of DA-8010 with Clarithromycin or Rifampicin: Influence of CYP2D6 Phenotype on the Extent of These Interactions.
abstract: This study aimed to evaluate the pharmacokinetic (PK) drug-drug interactions (DDIs) of DA-8010 with clarithromycin or rifampicin, and to assess the influence of cytochrome P450 (CYP) 2D6 phenotype on the extent of these interactions.
